name: The Solo Reasoner
definition: Single-agent ReAct loop for focused intelligence tasks
methods: Chain-of-Thought, Self-Critique, Reflection Scoring
application: Single-source report analysis, indicator enrichment
code_archetype: LangChain LCEL ReAct agent with tool calling

name: The Reflection Agent
methods: Internal scoring, critic models, trajectory validation
application: OSINT verification loop, analytic bias detection
code_archetype: LangGraph state machine with reflexion node

name: The Tool-Forager
definition: Agent with comprehensive external tool access
methods: Function calling, JSON schema execution, grounded output
application: Multi-source data harvesting, real-time collection
code_archetype: OpenAI function calling with Recon-ng, Shodan, STIX tools

name: The Planner-Executor
methods: Chain-of-thought with memory rehydration, execution DAGs
application: Multi-phase operation planning, collection management
code_archetype: LangGraph DAG flow with priority queues

name: The Parallel Collector
methods: Concurrent tool invocation, aggregation, deduplication
application: Simultaneous OSINT/SIGINT metadata collection
code_archetype: CrewAI parallel task execution with consensus scoring

name: The Multi-Agent Crew
methods: Planner + Retriever + Executor + Validator + Reporter roles
application: All-source intelligence fusion; Red/Blue Cell simulation
code_archetype: CrewAI role-based crew with hierarchical process manager

name: The Debate Agent
methods: Devil's Advocacy automation, competing hypotheses generation
application: Automated Analysis of Competing Hypotheses (ACH)
code_archetype: AutoGen two-agent debate pattern with judge agent

name: The RAG-Operator
methods: Dense vector retrieval, hybrid BM25+dense, re-ranking
application: All-source fusion from live document collections
code_archetype: LangChain RAG with Chroma/Pinecone over STIX feeds

name: The Memory-State Machine
methods: Episodic memory write/read, consolidation, attention-weighted retrieval
application: Long-term asset tracking, longitudinal pattern-of-life analysis
code_archetype: LangGraph with PostgreSQL episodic memory and mem0/MemGPT

name: The Control Plane Agent
definition: Modular tool routing through single interface
methods: "Control Plane as a Tool" abstraction, modular routing logic
application: Scalable multi-source collection with single interface
code_archetype: FastAPI meta-tool endpoint wrapping N sub-tools

name: The Surveillance Agent
methods: Scheduled polling, anomaly detection, threshold alerting
application: Persistent target monitoring, dark web alerting, infrastructure tracking
code_archetype: n8n or LangGraph cron-triggered agent with Shodan/SpiderFoot APIs

name: The Red Team Agent
methods: Adversarial prompt generation, attack-tree traversal, kill chain simulation
application: Penetration testing automation, vulnerability discovery
code_archetype: AutoGen code execution agent with MITRE ATT&CK tool plugin

name: The Cover Story Generator
methods: Persona generation, document synthesis, consistency checking
application: NOC legend maintenance, sock puppet operational security
code_archetype: GPT-4o with structured output schemas for persona consistency

name: The Deception Detector
methods: Cross-source triangulation, metadata analysis, deepfake detection API calls
application: Source vetting, product validation, disinformation identification
code_archetype: LangChain agent with Hive Moderation, Sightengine, C2PA APIs

name: The Analyst in the Loop
methods: Interrupt-and-query, confidence-gated human escalation
application: Supervised analysis; compliance-constrained environments
code_archetype: LangGraph with human_approval node and async interrupt handlers

name: The Cyber Sentinel
methods: SIEM integration, SOAR automation, ATT&CK technique mapping
application: Autonomous SOC tier-1 triage, IOC enrichment
code_archetype: CrewAI crew with Splunk/Elastic SIEM tools and STIX/TAXII writer

name: The Supply Chain Inspector
methods: SBOM parsing, dependency graph analysis, commit diff analysis
application: Open-source supply chain threat hunting (post-XZ Utils)
code_archetype: Python agent with Syft/Grype SBOM tools and GitHub commit analysis

name: The GEOINT Analyst
methods: Vision model object detection, change detection, chronolocation
application: Facility monitoring, order-of-battle assessment
code_archetype: GPT-4o Vision + Google Earth Engine API + LangChain agent loop

name: The Cognitive Inoculant
methods: Manipulation technique detection, inoculation content generation, user adaptation
application: Population-scale cognitive security intervention delivery
code_archetype: LangChain agent with CAMBREX taxonomy + API delivery pipeline

name: The Hierarchical Command
methods: Goal decomposition, subagent delegation, output aggregation, failure recovery
application: Complex multi-domain operations with role separation
code_archetype: LangGraph supervisor pattern with specialized subagent nodes
